'''Dye grenades''' were a type of [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] that released billowing clouds when detonated.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> Similar in use to [[Smoke grenade/Legends|smoke grenades]], dye grenades were used to mark landing zones for incoming vessels, as well as obscuring the vision of enemy forces.<ref name="EGWT" />

*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
